_source: Five Parsecs Compendium pp.96-100 (Terrain Generation) + Core Rules pp.108-109 (Standard Terrain Set)
_note: D6 tables are canonical from the Compendium. Feature pool descriptions are thematic suggestions for the visual map — not Core Rules text.

standard_terrain_set._source: Core Rules p.109 — Standard Terrain Set for 3x3 table

industrial_zone.name: Industrial Zone
notable_features_d6: LARGE: Large structure or facility
LARGE: Cluster of industrial items (barrels, machinery)
LARGE: Open space surrounded by fencing, barricades, or low walls
LARGE: Landing pad or loading bay with scatter terrain
LARGE: Cargo area with containers, crates, civilian vehicles
LARGE: Single large structure or two medium structures
regular_features_d6: LINEAR: Fences, railings, or barricades
SMALL: Building (cluster nearby buildings or trade for single large)
Open ground with incidental items (sign post, boulder)
Scatter: Spread-out scatter terrain (boulders, barrels, vehicle parts)
Open ground with single central piece (statue, tree)
SMALL: Industrial terrain (shipping containers, barrel cluster, vehicle)
large_features: Large factory building (full cover, blocks LOS, can enter for elevated position)
Fuel storage tanks (full cover, blocks LOS)
Cargo crane (elevated platform, partial cover)
Control tower (full cover, 2 levels, overlooks battlefield)
Loading dock with parked hauler (full cover)
small_features: Stack of cargo containers (full cover, can climb on top)
Conveyor belt structure (partial cover, elevated walkway)
linear_features: Metal barricade line, 6" (partial cover, waist height)
Chain-link fence section, 5" (partial cover, blocks movement)
Conveyor rail barrier, 4" (partial cover, low wall)
Safety railing, 6" (blocks movement, can vault)

wilderness.name: Wilderness
wilderness.description: Natural terrain with rocks, vegetation, and uneven ground.
notable_features_d6: LARGE: Forested hill or high ground
LARGE: Difficult-to-cross feature (swamp)
LARGE: Group of rock formations
LARGE: Forested area with paths to traverse
LARGE: Large bare hill
LARGE: Single building, ruin, or similar
regular_features_d6: SMALL: Difficult to pass feature (swamp or dense forest)
SMALL: Rock formation surrounded by plants
SMALL: Cluster of plants
SMALL: Rock formation
Open space with scattered single plants
LINEAR: Natural feature (hedgerow or line of trees)
large_features: Large rock formation (full cover, can climb for elevated position)
Dense tree cluster (full cover, blocks LOS)
Hilltop (elevated, open)
Ruined cabin (full cover, single room, can enter)
Creek or shallow pond (open terrain)
small_features: Boulder (full cover for crouching, partial for standing)
Small hill (slight elevation, partial cover at crest)
linear_features: Stone wall section, 6" (partial cover, waist height)
Fallen log barrier, 5" (partial cover, low obstacle)
Hedge row, 8" (concealment, blocks LOS)
Stream bank, 6" (delineates terrain)

alien_ruin.name: Alien Ruin
alien_ruin.description: Ancient alien structures, strange formations, and otherworldly terrain.
notable_features_d6: LARGE: Scatter terrain with plants mixed in
LARGE: Large pile of rubble and debris
LARGE: Ruined building, possibly multi-story
LARGE: Remnants of landing pad or plaza, overgrown with plants
LARGE: Ruined tower surrounded by rubble
LARGE: Large statue surrounded by plants or rubble
regular_features_d6: SMALL: Odd feature (crystals, weird plants)
SMALL: Ruined single building
SMALL: Partial ruin (half building surrounded by rubble)
Open space with a few items of scatter
SMALL: Strange statue or vehicle wreck
Scatter: Scattered plants with some rubble
large_features: Crystalline pillar (full cover)
Collapsed alien wall section (full cover on one side, partial on other)
Strange growth mound (full cover)
Sunken chamber entrance (full cover, drop-down access)
Monolith (full cover, tall)
small_features: Ancient console (partial cover, low wall equivalent)
linear_features: Crystal ridge line, 6" (partial cover, blocks LOS at ground level)
Ancient wall fragment, 5" (full cover, crumbling at ends)
Energy barrier, 4" (blocks movement)
Vine curtain, 8" (concealment, blocks LOS)

crash_site.name: Crash Site
crash_site.description: Downed spacecraft wreckage scattered across the area.
notable_features_d6: LARGE: Structure with damage (or reduced to heap of rubble)
LARGE: Cluster of natural features (rocks, plants) with wreckage among them
LARGE: Forested area on fire
LARGE: Pile of wreckage
LARGE: Large chunk of wreckage in crater
LARGE: Large crater
regular_features_d6: Open with scatter (mixture of natural features and wreckage)
Scatter: Scattered bits of wreckage
SMALL: Larger piece of wreckage
SMALL: Crater
SMALL: Natural feature (rocks, plants, hedgerow)
Open ground with smoke from fire
large_features: Main hull section (full cover, can enter, 2 access points)
Engine nacelle (full cover)
Cockpit wreckage (full cover, elevated on impact crater rim)
Cargo bay section (full cover, large open interior)
Wing section (partial cover, angled surface, can climb on top)
small_features: Landing gear strut (partial cover, tall, blocks LOS at ground level)
Impact crater (below ground level, full cover when inside)
linear_features: Hull plate wall section, 6" (full cover, jagged edges)
Fuselage ribbing, 5" (partial cover, can see through gaps)
Cable tangle barrier, 4" (blocks movement)
Debris wall, 8" (partial cover, unstable)

urban_settlement.name: Urban Settlement
urban_settlement._note: Not in Compendium D6 tables — synthesized from Core Rules terrain categories
urban_settlement.description: City blocks, hab-units, and street barricades.
notable_features_d6: LARGE: Multi-story hab-block (full cover, roof access)
LARGE: Market stall plaza (partial cover from stalls, open center)
LARGE: Elevated walkway bridge (connects buildings)
LARGE: Collapsed building ruin (full cover, unstable upper floor)
LARGE: Communications tower (climbable, elevated position)
LARGE: Large building with multiple rooms
regular_features_d6: SMALL: Parked ground vehicle (full cover, low profile)
SMALL: Shopfront with shattered windows (partial cover, can enter)
LINEAR: Concrete jersey barrier row, 6" (partial cover)
Scatter: Street debris, trash piles, abandoned crates
SMALL: Sandbag emplacement (partial cover, firing position)
Open ground with street lamp post
large_features: Multi-story hab-block (full cover, 3 levels, roof access)
Market stall plaza (partial cover from stalls, open center)
Elevated walkway bridge (partial cover, connects buildings)
Collapsed building ruin (full cover, unstable upper floor)
Communications tower (full cover at base, climbable)
small_features: Parked ground vehicle (full cover, low profile)
Shopfront with shattered windows (partial cover, can enter)
linear_features: Concrete jersey barrier row, 6" (partial cover, waist height)
Chain-link fence, 8" (partial cover, blocks movement)
Street barricade line, 5" (full cover, firing slits)
Low wall section, 6" (partial cover, can vault)

wasteland.name: Wasteland
wasteland._note: Not in Compendium D6 tables — synthesized from Core Rules terrain categories
wasteland.description: Blasted terrain with craters, wreckage, and toxic pools. Sparse cover.
notable_features_d6: LARGE: Deep blast crater (below ground, full cover inside)
LARGE: Wrecked vehicle hulk (full cover)
LARGE: Collapsed overpass section (full cover, elevated platform)
LARGE: Rusted storage silo (full cover, tall, single entry)
LARGE: Rubble mound (partial cover, elevated)
LARGE: Large crater with wreckage
regular_features_d6: SMALL: Shallow crater (partial cover when prone)
SMALL: Twisted metal wreckage (partial cover)
SMALL: Concrete slab fragment (partial cover)
Open ground with dead tree stumps
LINEAR: Rubble wall, 6" (partial cover, uneven height)
Scatter: Scrap metal, charred debris, dust mounds
large_features: Deep blast crater (below ground, full cover inside, open from above)
Wrecked vehicle hulk (full cover)
Collapsed overpass section (full cover, elevated platform)
Rusted storage silo (full cover, tall, single entry, climbable)
Rubble mound (partial cover, elevated)
small_features: Concrete slab fragment (partial cover, stable footing)
linear_features: Rubble wall, 6" (partial cover, uneven height)
Corroded pipe run, 5" (partial cover, low obstacle)
Blast barrier, 4" (full cover, reinforced)
Chain-link fence remnant, 8" (blocks movement)

ship_interior.name: Ship Interior
ship_interior._note: Not in Compendium D6 tables — synthesized from Core Rules terrain categories
ship_interior.description: Corridors, bulkheads, and cargo bays inside a starship.
notable_features_d6: LARGE: Bulkhead doorway (full cover when closed, chokepoint when open)
LARGE: Cargo bay with stacked crates (full cover, 2 levels)
LARGE: Airlock chamber (full cover)
LARGE: Turbolift shaft (full cover, vertical movement)
LARGE: Medbay with equipment (full cover)
LARGE: Engineering section with machinery
regular_features_d6: SMALL: Engineering console bank (partial cover)
SMALL: Corridor junction (partial cover at corners)
LINEAR: Bulkhead wall section, 6" (full cover, blast doors)
SMALL: Crew locker bank (partial cover, narrow space)
Open ventilation grate area
Scatter: Floor grating, loose cables, tool cases
large_features: Bulkhead doorway (full cover when closed, chokepoint when open)
Cargo bay with stacked crates (full cover, multiple firing positions, 2 levels)
Airlock chamber (full cover)
Turbolift shaft (full cover, vertical movement between decks)
Medbay with equipment (full cover)
small_features: Engineering console bank (partial cover, low wall)
Crew locker bank (partial cover, narrow space)
linear_features: Bulkhead wall section, 6" (full cover, blast doors at intervals)
Corridor railing, 5" (blocks movement, can vault)
Pipe run, 4" (partial cover, low obstacle)
Emergency barrier, 6" (partial cover, blocks corridor)
